title: microchilus callophylloides
intro: Microchilus callophylloides is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. The health benefits of Microchilus callophylloides include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
